jp.title: 仮面ライダー“ゼッツエクスドリーム” “極限の夢”ビジュアル解禁！
jp.description: 仮面ライダーシリーズ公式サイトです。令和仮面ライダー第7作となる「仮面ライダーゼッツ」や前作品「仮面ライダーガヴ」などの番組や映画の紹介は勿論、グッズ・玩具やイベントの情報など、シリーズ全般の情報を掲載しています。

source.name: ライフハッカー・ジャパン

jp.title: 35億人に影響するChromeの脆弱性、19件の修正を含む最新版が公開 アップデートを
jp.description: 世界人口の約40％が同じウェブブラウザを利用しているとなれば、そのブラウザに影響するセキュリティに関する問題も、それに見合う大きな問題になる。推定35億人のユーザーを抱えるGoogle Chromeがまさにそのブラウザであり、最新のセキュリ...

jp.title: トランプ氏、特使らのパキスタン派遣取りやめ 2回目直接協議実現せず
jp.description: トランプ米大統領は２５日、イランとの紛争終結に向けた協議のために予定していたウィットコフ中東担当特使らのパキスタンへの派遣を中止した。イ​ランのアラグチ外相はパキスタンの首都イスラマバードでシャリフ首相らと会談した後、‌出国し、２回目の直接協議は実現しなかった。和平の見通しが一段と不透明になった。

jp.title: 九州や四国で激しい雨 日中は広く20℃超えで寒暖差大 今日4月26日(日)の天気
jp.description: 今日26日は、前線や低気圧の影響で西から雨の範囲が広がり、九州や四国などで局地的に激しい雨が降るでしょう。最高気温は20℃を超える所が多く、東北や北海道は6月並みの所もありそうです。

world.title: 5 renewable energy facilities with 128.9 MW capacity now active - DOE
world.description: Five renewable energy projects with a combined capacity of 128.9 megawatts are now operational as of April 17, the Department of Energy said, marking early progress in its push to expand the country’s green energy supply.

world.title: Xenophobia attacks: S.A Police Ministry's statement is not enough
world.description: A former Ghana High Commissioner to South Africa, Charles Owiredu, has described a recent statement by South Africa’s police ministry on xenophobic attacks as inadequate.

world.title: Experts say this is the best fruit to eat for a healthier liver
world.description: On top of flavonoids, apples contain special special compounds that appear to lend a helping hand to the liver.

world.title: Toronto man's HIV no longer detectable after bone marrow transplant
world.description: A Toronto patient who has been living with HIV for 27 years is in remission – and potentially cured, according to his doctors – after a bone marrow transplant from a donor naturally resistant to the virus.

world.title: Person in custody after Trump evacuated in shooting incident at White House correspondents’ dinner
world.description: Event ended suddenly with loud gunshots and immediate commotion, and the US president and first lady were unharmed

world.title: Hyeri Almost Got Washed Away At Sea, Shares Frightening Details
world.description: The actress recently shared a scary anecdote from her Malaysia trip where she almost got swept away at the sea at night.

world.title: Sale of dead man’s home ruled a ‘sham’, linked to illegal moneylending
world.description: The Shah Alam High Court says the defendants, including a law firm, colluded to induce the late K Suppiah into signing a sale and purchase agreement for his house.

world.title: powered tools transform TB detection in Uganda
world.description: Village Health Teams (VHTs) and community health workers previously struggled with bulky paper-based systems. They carried large volumes of paperwork, which could easily be damaged by rain or lost, making it difficult to retrieve information.

world.title: Next phase of growth
world.description: For this week's cover story on City & Country, we feature Mah Sing Group Bhd (KL:MAHSING) founder and group managing director Tan Sri Leong Hoy Kum, who talks about its decade-high sales of RM2.51 billion recorded in 2025. The key contributor to this achievement was the strong performance of its signature M Series projects.

world.title: Fans pack Hollywood for premiere of Michael Jackson biopic, starring his nephew, Jaafar
world.description: The film 'Michael' chronicles the legendary artiste's rise from a child star to one of the world's most famous pop icons, and arrives 16 years after his death.
